h2: MORE POLICE AND SAFER STREETS
h2: LAUNCH A NEW BORDER COMMAND
text_excerpt: General 2 — Feryal Clark MP 0 Skip to Content Feryal Clark MP Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Campaigns Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Open Menu Close Menu Open Menu Close Menu Feryal Clark MP Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Campaigns Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Home About Contact News Achievements Events Priorities Folder: Campaigns Back Banking Hub Ponders End Pledges Join my mailing list Priorities Labour has changed REBUILD THE ECONOMY FOR WORKING PEOPLE With tough spending rules, we can grow our economy and keep taxes, mortgages and inflation as low as possible for residents in Enfield North. CUT NHS WAITING LISTS Provide 40,000 more evening and weekend appointments each week for families in Enfield North and across the country. SET UP GREAT BRITISH ENERGY A new publicly-owned clean energy clean power company, cutting bills for residents and delivering green jobs. MORE POLICE AND SAFER STREETS Crack down on antisocial behaviour, with more neighbourhood police for Enfield North, paid for by ending wasteful contracts. OPPORTUNITIES FOR YOUNG PEOPLE Recruit 6,500 new teachers in key subjects to set children up for life, paid for by ending tax breaks for private schools. LAUNCH A NEW BORDER COMMAND With hundreds of new specialist investigators and counter-terror powers to smash criminal gangs and strengthen our borders. See FERYAL'S ACHIEVEMENTS Privacy Policy Subscribe to my newsletter Email Address Submit Thank you! I will be in touch with you news and updates! FOLLOW Promoted by Hassan Yusuf, on behalf of Feryal Clark, both at Celbic Hall, 77 Lancaster Road, Enfield, EN2 0DW
